## Linked issues

## Test plan

- [ ] Unit tests
- [ ] Manual webcam test
- [ ] No raw video leaves local mode
- [ ] No NaN/Infinity reaches renderer

## Security and privacy

- [ ] Camera/video/audio behavior is unchanged, or `docs/SECURITY_REVIEW.md` was reviewed
- [ ] Recording/export behavior is unchanged, or local-only/export risks are documented
- [ ] Relay/token/origin behavior is unchanged, or downgrade/replay/origin risks are documented
- [ ] Model/WASM/CDN assets are unchanged, or version and integrity notes are updated
- [ ] Residual security/privacy risks are noted in the linked issue or PR summary

## Tracking quality checklist

- [ ] No obvious jitter regression
- [ ] No broken finger/wrist pose
- [ ] No face/mouth flicker regression
- [ ] No drum false-hit regression, if relevant
